ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-19-2010 IN DEPT. 220, PLAINTIFF FRANK PULOS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 10/25/10 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/18/10 @ 9:00 AM IN ROOM 603. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF 4/21/2011 IS VACATED. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL ISSUE DEMANDS BY 10/13/10. ALL PARTIES AGREED TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING DISCOVERY AND ON THE LANGUAGE OF THE PROPOSED ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (220)
